description_long: This is a hand-crafted doll with a rounded body and a stylized, childlike face. The doll is dressed in a blue dress adorned with white and red flower patterns, and it features a matching blue headscarf tied around its head. The face is painted with large, round blue eyes, rosy cheeks, and a small, smiling mouth, giving it a cheerful and inviting appearance. The arms are sculpted to rest on the front of the body, with blue sleeves and hands visible. The back of the doll is plain, with the headscarf and dress continuing around, and the top of the head has a small, broken-off protrusion, possibly from a decorative element. The overall finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture typical of painted ceramic or clay.
description: A cheerful, hand-painted doll in a blue floral dress and headscarf, with a rounded body and smiling face. The surface is matte and slightly rough, resembling painted ceramic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's smiling face, blue headscarf, and floral-patterned blue dress with visible arms and hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the headscarf, and the arm resting on the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headscarf, plain back of the dress, and the broken-off top protrusion.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, headscarf, and the arm with blue sleeve resting on the body.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional folk-style blue dress with white and red floral patterns, paired with a matching blue headscarf; the dress features puffed sleeves and a simple, rustic design.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright seated or standing position with both arms bent and resting on the front of the body; the head faces forward and is slightly tilted upward.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with wide, round blue eyes, raised eyebrows, and rosy cheeks; the mouth is small and upturned.
attribute_hair_style: Short, light blonde hair mostly covered by a blue headscarf, with only a small fringe visible at the front.
